detail.notes: CBD outpost of Fitzroy flagship. Famous cold drinks. Online shop

detail.blend: House (Colombia + Brazil) — milk choc, caramel, clean fruit
detail.notes: Famous for wooden chairs hanging from the ceiling. Tiny, retail shelf, quick stop

detail.blend: Dukes Espresso — red apple, milk choc, roasted almond
detail.notes: Inside historic Ross House — beautiful tilework. Counter seating, large online shop

detail.blend: Seasonal — milk choc, honey, subtle stone fruit
detail.notes: Multiple CBD spots; Flinders Ln has a filter bar. Roastery in Hawthorn. Online shop

detail.blend: Patricia Patricia (medium) — caramel, cocoa, subtle fruit
detail.fruity: High — guest roasters (Seven Seeds, Market Lane)
detail.notes: ⚠ Standing espresso bar only, no seating. Brick alleyway, neon sign. One-stop for multiple labels
